baseline.description: Mixed admin catalog journey: auth, browse, create/update/delete with per-run cleanup

stress.description: Read-heavy browse stress: staged catalog list/detail/brands/types/health with per-run canonical catalog state

stress-catalog.description: Admin catalog CRUD stress: per-run prepare/auth plus create/read/update/delete and browse

stress-auth.description: Authentication stress story: admin login, demo-user login, and rejected credentials without catalog mutation

warmup.description: Warmup primer: lightweight catalog reads plus one auth; per-run state reset stays in diag setup/teardown for measured scenarios
